assertions.text: Output includes a complete Midjourney prompt formatted as a single paragraph ready to paste
The prompt includes at least one technical Midjourney parameter (--ar, --v, --s, --c, or similar)
Lighting is described in cinematographic terms (e.g., Rembrandt, practical, golden hour) not generic descriptors like 'nice light'
A breakdown of 3-5 bullet points follows the prompt explaining why each major choice was made
No generic style descriptors appear such as 'beautiful', 'stunning', or 'amazing'
